title: EARLY ASSESSMENT AND SUPPORT ALLIANCE - 211info
text: CLATSOP BEHAVIORAL HEALTHCARE EARLY ASSESSMENT AND SUPPORT ALLIANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides rapid identification, support, assessment and treatment for teenagers and young adults who are experiencing the early signs of psychosis. Services include education about psychosis; medication along with medication monitoring; individual and group counseling; multi-family groups; occupational therapy; family education and support; vocational training and life-skills coaching; 24/7 crisis services; connections to community resources. 115 W Bond Street Astoria, OR 97103 Eligibility: Ages 12-30 who have had a first episode of psychosis within the last 12 months or who are experiencing early at-risk symptoms for psychosis and their families. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 325-5722 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 325-5722 [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for intake FEES: Contracted to serve people with Oregon Health Plan/Columbia Pacific CCO, Oregon Medicaid, and Moda insurance. DUII and mandated substance use disorder programs operate on a sliding scale based on income. Some programs have limited grant funding that does not rely on insurance payment. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Clatsop County Services: Early Intervention for Mental Illness Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - CLATSOP COUNTY 24-HOUR CRISIS LINE MENTAL HEALTH CARE FACILITIES - CLATSOP BEHAVIORAL HEALTHCARE REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES PROGRAM SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - RECOVERY SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CLATSOP BEHAVIORAL HEALTHCARE
